[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up image shows a large, plush-looking pink-and-white face with closed eyes and a small inset video of a person.

The main focus is a cartoonish, soft-looking character face occupying most of the frame, with pink shapes like eyebrows or tufts above closed, curved eyes, a pale gray/white face area, and a gentle closed-mouth smile. A smaller picture-in-picture box appears on the lower right, containing a person’s head and shoulders; the person has short dark hair, a dark top, and is facing the camera.

The background behind the plush face is unclear and appears to be out of focus. The inset shows an indoor setting with a neutral background; lighting is dim to moderate and the person is illuminated from the front.

No important visible text detected.

The image appears to combine a close-up of a plush or cartoon character with a small inset video view of a person. The main character has closed eyes and a calm smile while the inset person faces forward.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
